video.long_summary_en: By Rachael O'Connor Life and Trends Reporter Share Newsweek is a Trust Project member If you go on social media , you may have heard people debating the meaning of AI video The Shape Store. But what is The Shape Store, who created it, and what is all the discourse about? What Is The Infinite Archive? The Infinite Archive is a social media account known for posting AI-generated images and videos made to look as if they are found footage from a fictional past. Its videos often look like VHS or camcorder footage and are presented without much explanation, letting fans discuss the meaning online.

audio.title: Un nouveau collectible Game Boy mini ne joue que de la musique Pokémon ? Quelle provocation !
